meaning: 1. to park (a car etc); 2. to moor (a boat etc); 3. to leave sth (in a
sentence: 这里禁止停放电动车，请移到指定区域。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ jìnzhǐ tíng fàng diàndòngchē, qǐng yí dào zhǐdìng qūyù.
english: Parking e-bikes here is prohibited; please move them to the designated area.

sentence: 她从小就梦想成为一名歌星。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù mèng xiǎng chéng wéi yī míng gē xīng.
english: She has dreamed of becoming a famous singer since she was little.

meaning: 1. actually; 2. as it turns out; 3. indeed; 4. of course
sentence: 敢情你早就知道这件事了！
pinyin: Gǎnqíng nǐ zǎo jiù zhīdào zhè jiàn shì le!
english: So you already knew about this all along!

sentence: 这座殿堂已有几百年的历史。
pinyin: Zhè zuò diàn táng yǐ yǒu jǐ bǎi nián de lì shǐ.
english: This palace hall has a history of several hundred years.

sentence: 春节前夕，快递人员非常紧缺。
pinyin: Chūnjié qiányè, kuàidì rényuán fēicháng jǐnquē.
english: Delivery workers are in very short supply on the eve of the Spring Festival.
